report.summary: UX audit and visual polish for 7 new learn/tool pages from today's build cycle — fixed h1 gradient text fallback across all 7 pages, added table scope attributes for accessibility, fixed table overflow on 4 pages, and created 2 missing OG images (bear-market investing, tariffs/trade-war).

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added fallback color (#e6edf3) to h1 gradient text on all 7 pages — prevents invisible text in non-WebKit browsers (Firefox fallback)
Added scope='col' to all table <th> elements across 7 pages for screen reader accessibility (WCAG compliance)
Fixed gas fees guide section 3 table wrapper missing overflowX:auto — table now scrolls horizontally on mobile instead of breaking layout
Fixed Starknet guide table wrapper missing overflowX:auto — wrapped table in scrollable container
Fixed ETF in-kind redemption guide table wrapper missing overflowX:auto
Verified bear-market and smart-money pages already had proper overflowX:auto via S.tableWrap pattern

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-bear-market-investing-guide (1200x630 SVG) — Fear & Greed gauge showing 10/Extreme Fear, BTC price chart with buy zone highlight, DCA strategy stats, bear-to-bull color gradient
OG image: tariffs-crypto (1200x630 SVG) — 4 impact stat cards (BTC -35%, ETH 0.78 correlation, +$12B stablecoin inflows, -22% DeFi TVL), tariff timeline from Jan 2025 to 2026

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: Updated bear-market page OG image references from nonexistent .png to .svg (3 occurrences)
Updated tariffs page OG image reference from nonexistent .png to .svg (1 occurrence)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/depin-ecosystem-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, table th scope. Good: breadcrumb, ToC, FAQ, structured data, OG image present
/learn/crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, 2 tables th scope, section 3 table overflowX. Good: breadcrumb, ToC, FAQ, structured data, OG image present
/learn/starknet-validity-rollup-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, table th scope, table overflowX. Good: existing OG image present
/learn/crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, table th scope, table overflowX. Good: existing OG image present
/learn/crypto-bear-market-investing-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, all table th scopes (4 tables), OG image created + metadata .png→.svg. Good: S.tableWrap pattern already correct
/learn/smart-money-onchain-signals-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, all table th scopes (3 tables). Good: existing OG image, S.tableWrap correct
/learn/tariffs-trade-war-crypto-impact-guide-2026 — Fixed: h1 gradient fallback, th scope via S.th pattern, OG image created + metadata .png→.svg. Good: S.tableWrap correct
